items.name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 2026 Spring/Summer New Smile Bag.
items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 2026 Spring/Summer New Smile Bag.
The It Bag from over a decade ago, the CE Smile Bag, is back......
For the CE 2026 Spring/Summer show, Michael Rider brought the decade-old, iconic "Smile Bag" back into the public eye.
Besides the narrower, longer silhouette and the frown turning into a smile, the ultra-flat Flat Cabas Smile Bag has also been released. Many different sizes and colorways are coming soon ✅
Style No.: 123963
Color: White
Dimensions: 44.5x31.5x0.5cm

items.name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 26 Spring Collection New Smile Bag 👛
items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ 26 Spring Collection New Smile Bag 👛
😐 turns 🙂, CE Smile Bag returns with a fresh look!
CE PRINTEMPS 2026 Spring Collection!
NEW LUGGAGE New Smile Bag
The classic of memory returns with a new look!
👜Lightweight material, modern lines
Still the It Bag with maximum recognizability!
Exuding a minimalist and chic modern temperament.
At the 2026 Spring debut, Creative Director Michael Rider brought the "Smile Bag" back with a surprise.
Smooth and lustrous leather, saddle stitching and piping create a soft, rounded horizontal silhouette.
The side zipper design presents a unique smile arc, cleverly echoing the name "Smile Bag".
By reinterpreting the classic design with a modern silhouette, it is lighter and more versatile, presenting an elegant yet casual style!
Style No.: 123693
Color: Black
Dimensions: Base 36x22x16cm
Opening 56cm

items.name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE Arc de Triomphe Kelly Bag 👜
items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE Arc de Triomphe Kelly Bag 👜
New Arc de Triomphe collection, full of premium feel!
Minimalist and exquisite silhouette. Whether it's the steady black, low-key brown, classic monogram, etc... it radiates incomparable premium feel ❤️. The Kelly classic lines are simple and generous, no need for extra decoration, just showing aesthetic charm 🫶🏻
Model: 118113 Plain Black
Size: 20.5x13x8 (with original packaging)

items.name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE VANITY Makeup Pouch 👜
items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE VANITY Makeup Pouch 👜
This classic makeup bag is inspired by the MAISON CE makeup bag,
It brings new life to the handbag series this season, and the size is just right.
Practical, versatile, and exquisite, the name comes from its CE shape.
CE VANITY is the first season launch, made of natural calfskin, CE's most noble original leather, sturdy texture, and can be shaped into a delicate and distinct structure! Inspired by the Triomphe chain.
The tan leather trim is a CE TRIOMPHE CANVAS feature!
Style No.: 119463
Color: Brown (with original packaging)
Size: 18x12x18cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ New Upgraded Triome Folio
items.name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️ New Upgraded Triome Folio
Summer26 latest style in the Triome family 👜
Triome Folio medium handbag is here. Clean long body, embossed gold Triumph buckle, simple and elegant.
Added a handle: short top handle for a refined look 🤳
Add a shoulder strap for a relaxed commuter style.\Fits card holder + phone + touch-up essentials.\Lightweight, comfortable to carry all day 👍🏻
Style No.: 123203
Color: Black Crocodile Silver Buckle
Size: 25.5x14x7.5cm
(Original packaging included)

New Arrival CE Triomphe Kelly Bag
New Kelly Triomphe bag, full of sophistication!
Simple and exquisite silhouette presents a capable style and pure aesthetics. Whether it is the steady black, understated brown, or soft pink, it radiates unparalleled sophistication.
The Kelly classic shape has simple and generous lines, no need for extra decoration, and instantly shows aesthetic charm.

New Arrival CE Triomphe Kelly Bag
New Kelly Triomphe bag, full of sophistication!
Simple and exquisite silhouette presents a capable style and pure aesthetics. Whether it is the steady black, understated brown, or soft pink, it radiates unparalleled sophistication.
The Kelly classic shape has simple and generous lines, no need for extra decoration, and instantly shows aesthetic charm.
Style No.: 117523
Size: 25.5x18.5x10

items.name_en: New Arrival French High-End Custom Chane1
items.name_cn:
New Arrival French High-End Custom Chane1
AS4654# Chane1 Mini Full-Diamond Flap Bag, Latest Fall/Winter Hardware ~ Made of imported sheepskin, top craftsmanship, perfect handiwork!
Whether for street wear or parties, this metal design is easy to handle. It took a lot of time and effort, with every detail striving for perfection. The inside and outside are made of lambskin, with a soft and delicate touch.
It looks super good when worn. It can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, and the strap can be removed.
size: 14.5x19.5x8cm
